MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SEYFARTH SHAW LLP'S DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

Off calendar. The parties did not meet and confer "in person or by telephone" in compliance with CCP 430.41. The parties are ordered to meet and confer in compliance with the code and the response to the amended complaint is now due by April 15, 2022.

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. NAZO S. SEMERDJIAN, Esq. of the Bernheim Law Firm (Tel: 310-975-4728) for plaintiffs;
Atty. JOSEPH J. YBARRA, Esq. of Halpern May Ybarra Gelberg LLP (Tel: 213-402-1900) for defendant Seyfarth Shaw LLP.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SEYFARTH SHAW LLP'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with the modification of allowing leave to amend, as follows:

Defendant Seyfarth Shaw LLP's Demurrer to Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint is sustained with leave to amend. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.
